error_handling_strategies.detection: HTTP middleware validation for MIME type; Async worker try/catch block with timeout; Storage driver check for disk availability
error_handling_strategies.response: Return 400 Bad Request with validation details; Reject with 403 Quota Exceeded; Failover to offline queue for sync; Return 504 Gateway Timeout for indexing failures
error_handling_strategies.surfacing: JSON error payload with field-specific validation messages; Admin dashboard metrics for storage usage; Logs flagged with severity ERROR; User receives 'Asset Failed Upload' toast notification

error_handling_strategies.detection: Circuit breaker pattern on provider API calls; Timeout middleware on AI inference; Confidence score threshold check on results
error_handling_strategies.response: Failover to cached results; Retry with exponential backoff for provider API; Propagate empty results with fallback recommendation
error_handling_strategies.surfacing: 502 Bad Gateway for external API failures; 'Low Confidence' warning badge on AI results; UI renders fallback list if primary provider unavailable

error_handling_strategies.detection: AI confidence score validation below 0.7 threshold; Cron job polling for deadline state; Queue depth monitor; Schema validation on extracted text
error_handling_strategies.response: Flag document for manual review; Generate critical alert ticket; Retry notification payload with retry count limit
error_handling_strategies.surfacing: Critical severity logs; Admin alert for missed deadlines; User sees 'Compliance Action Required' banner; Webhook return 500 for critical rule mismatches

error_handling_strategies.detection: State machine validator before transition; Transaction rollback on constraint violation; Timeout on state update query
error_handling_strategies.response: Reject transition with 409 Conflict; Queue failed audit write; Compensating transaction to revert to previous state
error_handling_strategies.surfacing: 409 Conflict with allowed transitions list; UI shows 'Action Processing Failed' status; Detailed stack trace logged for support ticketing

error_handling_strategies.detection: Transport library timeout response; Batch job status check; Bounce report parsing from gateway; Email address format regex check
error_handling_strategies.response: Queue message with exponential backoff; Partial batch success reporting; Skip invalid recipients and continue batch
error_handling_strategies.surfacing: 503 Service Unavailable during gateway outage; Bounce rate percentage in batch summary; Individual recipient delivery status in UI

error_handling_strategies.detection: Token expiration check in header; Scope validation against RLS policy; Signature verification on request; 405 Method Not Allowed check
error_handling_strategies.response: Immediate 401 Unauthorized or 403 Forbidden; Block request without processing; Log suspicious IP address
error_handling_strategies.surfacing: HTTP 401/403 with security scope reason; No PII logged; Security alert sent to SOC team for repeated violations; WAF block rule trigger

error_handling_strategies.detection: Payment gateway error code parsing; Idempotency key check in request header; Timeout on webhook callback; Transaction status polling
error_handling_strategies.response: Return gateway decline reason code; Queue duplicate request for manual review; Retry transient failures with circuit breaker
error_handling_strategies.surfacing: 402 Payment Required with specific decline reason; Receipt generation blocked; Admin portal flag for pending payments
